title: Update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.45.4
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | patch | `v1.45.3` -> `v1.45.4` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage</summary>

### [`v1.45.4`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.45.4)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.45.3...v1.45.4)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.45.2 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1476](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1476)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.14 to 1.15.15 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1478](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1478)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.13.0 to 0.14.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1479](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1479)
-   imageStore: add a GarbageCollect() method by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1484](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1484)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.14.0 to 0.14.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1486](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1486)
-   Test btrfs in CI by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1485](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1485)
-   idmap: new package by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1487](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1487)
-   test helper: maxArgs = 0 is actually a meaningful value by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1482](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1482)
-   Makefile: remove vestiges of VMs, update $(sources) by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1481](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1481)
-   pkg/idmap: add boilerplate for unsupported by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1489](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1489)
-   \[CI:DOCS] Configure Renovate by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1490](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1490)
-   Cirrus: Update CI VM Images to F37 by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1491](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1491)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/go-winio to v0.6.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1495](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1495)
-   CI: check that cross-compilation works by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1499](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1499)
-   Test zfs in CI by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1500](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1500)
-   Migrate from github.com/tchap/go-patricia to github.com/tchap/go-patricia/v2 by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1501](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1501)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1502](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1502)
-   Run codespell on codebase by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1508](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1508)
-   Stop using golang.org/x/net/context by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1509](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1509)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.2 to 1.11.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1507](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1507)
-   options: reject empty runroot or graphroot by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1510](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1510)
-   overlay: allow unknown backing fs with mountProgram by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1512](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1512)
-   Don't hard code SELinux labels into code by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1514](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1514)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.6 to 0.9.7 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1516](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1516)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1490](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1490)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.45.2...v1.45.4

</details>
